title: Throne room (disambiguation)
content:
'''Throne room''' may refer to one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
[[File:TCWgame-DarthMaul.png|thumb|right|300px|[[Maul]] in the throne room of Mandalore, the Grand Salon]]
*The [[Grand Salon]], the '''throne room''' of [[Mandalore]].
*[[Galactic Emperor|Emperor's]] [[throne]] rooms
**The [[Emperor's throne room (Death Star)|'''Emperor's throne room''']] on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|DS-1 Death Star Mobile Battle Station]], the first [[Death Star]].
**The '''[[Emperor's Throne Room]]''', a location on the [[DS-2 Death Star II Mobile Battle Station|second Death Star]].
**The [[Emperor's throne room (Imperial Palace)|'''Emperor's throne room''']] in the [[Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant]].
**A different '''[[Emperor's throne room (Coruscant)|imperial throne room]]''' on Coruscant.
*The '''[[Grand Temple's throne room]]''' on [[Yavin 4]].
*The [[Boba Fett's Palace#Throne room|'''throne room''']] of [[Boba Fett's Palace|Jabba's Palace]].
*The [[Throne room (Pijal)|'''throne room''']] of the [[Pijali palace]].
*The [[Royal Palace of Alderaan throne room|'''throne room''']] of the [[Royal Palace of Alderaan]].
*The [[Throne room (Theed Royal Palace)|'''throne room''']] of the [[Theed Royal Palace]].
*'''[[Snoke's throne room]]''' on the ''[[Supremacy]]''.
*The '''[[Amphitheater of the Sith Eternal|Sith Citadel throne room]]''' on [[Exegol]], which housed the [[Throne of the Sith]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Emperor's throne room]]s
**The [[Emperor's throne room (Death Star)/Legends|'''Imperial throne room''']] on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]].
**The [[Emperor's Throne Room/Legends|'''Emperor's Throne Room''']] on the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]].
**The '''[[Imperial Throne Room]]''' in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
**The [[Imperial throne room (Emperor Palpatine Surgical Reconstruction Center)|'''throne room''']] in the [[Emperor Palpatine Surgical Reconstruction Center]] on Coruscant.
**The [[Throne Room Complex (Wayland)|'''Throne Room Complex''']] in [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].
**The [[Imperial throne room (Byss Citadel)|'''Imperial throne room''']] of the [[Dark Empire]] in the [[Emperor's Citadel]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].
*The '''[[Grand Audience Chamber]]''' in the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].
*The [[Jabba's Palace/Legends#Throne room|'''throne room''']] of [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
*'''[[Jabba's Throne Room]]''', an [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] bar designed and named after the aforementioned location in [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] Palace.
*The '''''[[Throne Room (Gravane station)|Throne Room]]''''', a hotel on [[Gravane station]].

{{Incomplete list}}

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*"'''[[The Throne Room]]'''," a musical piece that plays at the end of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].
